input_text: Orang Kelantan memang macam tu la, cakap pun orang tak faham, nak buat bisnes macam mana
reason: Stereotyping Kelantanese dialect as incomprehensible and linking it to business incompetence. Regional prejudice with dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Loghat Kelantan memang unik, kadang-kadang perlu masa untuk memahaminya.

input_text: Budak Kedah ni slow sikit la, kerja pun nak kena ajar banyak kali
reason: Stereotyping people from Kedah as slow and incompetent workers. Dismissive regional generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja baru ni perlukan latihan tambahan untuk memahami tugasan dengan baik.

input_text: Orang Terengganu memang suka lepak je, tak heran la negeri tak maju
reason: Negative stereotyping of Terengganu people as lazy, linking it to state development. Dismissive and prejudiced.
suggested_rewrite: Terengganu masih ada ruang untuk pembangunan ekonomi yang lebih pesat.

input_text: Pekerja cashier tu bodoh ke apa, scan barang pun tak betul, buang masa aku je
reason: Insulting a cashier as stupid over a scanning error. Rude personal attack on service worker.
suggested_rewrite: Cashier tu tersalah scan beberapa barang, harap pihak kedai boleh perbaiki sistem.

input_text: Dekat Pahang tu nak cari orang educated pun susah, semua kerja ladang je
reason: Stereotyping Pahang residents as uneducated plantation workers. Dismissive and condescending regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Pahang terkenal dengan sektor pertanian, dan ramai juga penduduknya yang berpendidikan tinggi.

input_text: Tak payah la depress sangat, orang lain lagi susah pun boleh hidup. Kau je lebih-lebih
reason: Dismissing someone's mental health struggle by comparing it to others' hardships. Invalidating and condescending.
suggested_rewrite: Aku faham kau rasa susah sekarang. Mungkin boleh cuba bercakap dengan kaunselor untuk dapatkan sokongan.

input_text: Mental health tu benda tipu je, zaman dulu mana ada anxiety semua ni, sekarang generasi lemah
reason: Dismissing mental health as fabricated and calling current generations weak. Spreads misinformation about mental health.
suggested_rewrite: Kesedaran tentang kesihatan mental semakin meningkat berbanding zaman dulu. Ini perkara positif.

input_text: Janji kerajaan nak turunkan harga minyak, last-last minyak naik lagi. Semua penipu belaka
reason: Sarcastic take on government fuel price promises with blanket accusation of all being liars. Dismissive and cynical.
suggested_rewrite: Kerajaan pernah berjanji turunkan harga minyak tetapi ia belum dilaksanakan. Rakyat berhak menuntut akauntabiliti.

input_text: Siapa naik LRT dengan bas tu memang orang takde kereta je la, kesian
reason: Elitist and condescending attitude toward public transport users, implying they are pitiful for not owning cars.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai orang memilih pengangkutan awam kerana ia lebih praktikal dan mesra alam.

input_text: Budak sekarang kerja setahun dah nak gaji 5K, tak sedar diri langsung
reason: Condescending generational commentary dismissing young workers' salary expectations without acknowledging economic realities.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi muda ada jangkaan gaji yang berbeza. Mungkin kita perlu faham kos sara hidup sekarang lebih tinggi.

input_text: Gaji naik 2%, harga barang naik 20%. Terima kasih kerajaan, memang pandai jaga rakyat
reason: Sarcastic criticism of government policy on wages vs inflation. Dismissive tone but addresses legitimate concern.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan gaji 2% tidak setimpal dengan kenaikan kos sara hidup. Kerajaan perlu kaji semula dasar ini.

input_text: Makcik kantin tu kedekut gila bagi lauk, bayar mahal tapi macam bagi makan kucing
reason: Insulting a canteen operator as extremely stingy with rude comparison. Personal attack on a specific individual.
suggested_rewrite: Porsi makanan di kantin agak kecil berbanding harga yang dikenakan. Harap boleh diperbaiki.

input_text: Politician cakap nak bantu rakyat tapi anak dia pakai Porsche. Muka tak malu betul
reason: Mild nepotism accusation with rude personal insult. Legitimate concern but expressed with contempt.
suggested_rewrite: Ada percanggahan apabila pemimpin yang berjanji membantu rakyat tetapi keluarganya hidup mewah. Perlu ketelusan.

input_text: Orang tua sekarang bising pasal budak muda tapi zaman diorang pun sama je, hipokrit
reason: Dismissive generalization calling older generation hypocrites. Rude intergenerational commentary.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap generasi ada cabaran tersendiri. Mungkin kita boleh saling memahami tanpa menghakimi.

input_text: Nasi lemak dah RM3.50? Dulu 50 sen. Negara apa ni, semua benda naik kecuali gaji
reason: Overly dramatic reaction to price increases with implicit blame on national governance. Frustrated but dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Harga nasi lemak sudah meningkat ketara. Kenaikan kos sara hidup ini perlu ditangani dengan serius.

input_text: Driver Grab ni memang buat hal, jalan berpusing-pusing padahal shortcut ada depan mata
reason: Generalizing Grab drivers negatively and implying deliberate route manipulation. Rude and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Driver Grab tadi ambil laluan yang lebih jauh. Mungkin boleh guna GPS untuk laluan yang lebih pendek.

input_text: Orang Perlis tu semua kenal-mengenal, negeri kecik macam kampung je pun
reason: Belittling Perlis as merely a village due to its small size. Dismissive regional stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Perlis memang negeri yang kecil dan masyarakatnya rapat. Itu salah satu kelebihan uniknya.

input_text: Nak mintak tolong customer service tapi macam cakap dengan robot, tak guna langsung
reason: Dismissing customer service staff as useless robots. Rude and dehumanizing complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman dengan customer service kurang memuaskan. Harap kualiti perkhidmatan dapat ditingkatkan.

input_text: Tengok orang naik motor je mesti orang susah, tak mampu kereta
reason: Elitist assumption that motorcycle riders are all poor. Condescending and classist.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai orang memilih motosikal kerana ia praktikal untuk mengelak kesesakan trafik.

input_text: Sabah tu jauh sangat la, rasa macam bukan Malaysia pun
reason: Dismissive remark implying Sabah doesn't feel like part of Malaysia, alienating East Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah memang jauh dari Semenanjung tetapi ia sebahagian penting dalam Malaysia yang kita banggakan.

input_text: Generasi muda sekarang asyik main phone je, nak harap apa diorang ni jaga negara
reason: Condescending dismissal of younger generation as phone-addicted and unreliable. Generational stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Generasi muda banyak menggunakan teknologi. Kita perlu membimbing mereka supaya seimbang antara digital dan tanggungjawab.

input_text: Johor orang semua rasa diorang hebat sebab dekat Singapura, padahal sama je
reason: Stereotyping Johor people as arrogant due to proximity to Singapore. Regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Johor memang ada kelebihan kerana berdekatan Singapura, tetapi setiap negeri ada keunikan tersendiri.

input_text: Kawan aku stress nak exam, aku cakap je relax la bro, exam je pun bukan nak mati
reason: Trivializing a friend's exam stress. Dismissive attitude toward mental pressure and academic anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: Kawan aku stress pasal exam. Aku cuba support dia dan cadangkan rehat kejap sebelum sambung study.

input_text: Selangor memang la kaya, tapi orang dia sombong gila, susah nak mesra
reason: Stereotyping Selangor residents as wealthy but arrogant and unfriendly. Regional generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Selangor memang negeri yang maju. Mungkin budaya bandar membuatkan orang nampak kurang mesra.

input_text: YB datang kampung masa pilihan raya je la, lepas tu hilang macam asap
reason: Cynical commentary about elected representatives only appearing during elections. Legitimate grievance expressed dismissively.
suggested_rewrite: Wakil rakyat perlu hadir secara konsisten, bukan hanya semasa musim pilihan raya.

input_text: GLC semua untung pergi mana tak tau, rakyat tetap miskin. Anak menteri je yang kayakan
reason: Cynical accusation that GLC profits only benefit ministers' children. Legitimate concern about transparency expressed rudely.
suggested_rewrite: GLC perlu lebih telus dalam pengagihan keuntungan supaya manfaat turut dirasai oleh rakyat.

input_text: Telco company ni scammer betul, potong data tanpa bagi notis, menyampah betul
reason: Calling telco companies scammers without nuance. Rude consumer complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Syarikat telco patut beri notis sebelum memotong data. Perkhidmatan perlu lebih telus.

input_text: Anak menteri dapat scholarship, anak rakyat biasa kena cari sendiri. Fair sangat la sistem ni
reason: Sarcastic nepotism accusation about scholarship allocation. Legitimate concern expressed with biting sarcasm.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem biasiswa perlu lebih telus dan berasaskan merit supaya semua pelajar layak mendapat peluang sama rata.

input_text: Wahh harga ayam naik lagi, kena makan rumput je la lepas ni macam kambing
reason: Overly dramatic sarcastic reaction to chicken price increase comparing people to goats eating grass.
suggested_rewrite: Harga ayam terus meningkat dan ini membebankan rakyat. Langkah kawalan harga perlu dikuatkuasakan.

input_text: Negeri Sembilan orang cakap pelik-pelik, loghat macam nak nyanyi je setiap masa
reason: Mocking the Negeri Sembilan dialect as strange and sing-song. Dismissive of regional linguistic identity.
suggested_rewrite: Loghat Negeri Sembilan memang unik dan menarik. Ia sebahagian daripada kepelbagaian bahasa di Malaysia.

input_text: Kesian tengok orang beratur panjang nak naik bas, hidup macam tu memang susah la
reason: Condescending pity toward bus commuters implying their lives are difficult just for using public transport.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan bas perlu diperbaiki supaya penumpang tidak perlu menunggu terlalu lama.

input_text: Doktor klinik kerajaan tu macam tak kisah, tengok pesakit 2 minit je dah suruh balik
reason: Accusing government clinic doctors of not caring, with dismissive tone about their service.
suggested_rewrite: Doktor klinik kerajaan mungkin terlalu sibuk. Kerajaan perlu tambah kakitangan untuk perkhidmatan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Orang Melaka asyik bangga dengan sejarah je tapi negeri tak kemana pun
reason: Dismissing Melaka's historical pride and belittling the state's current development.
suggested_rewrite: Melaka kaya dengan sejarah dan warisan budaya. Pembangunan moden juga boleh diseimbangkan dengan pemuliharaan sejarah.

input_text: Tak payah la nak sedih sangat pasal putus cinta, orang lain ada masalah lagi besar
reason: Invalidating someone's emotional pain over a breakup by comparing to others' problems. Dismissive of feelings.
suggested_rewrite: Putus cinta memang menyakitkan. Tak salah untuk rasa sedih, dan kau boleh ambil masa untuk pulih.

input_text: Pemandu Myvi memang selalu buat hal atas jalan, macam jalan bapak diorang punya
reason: Stereotyping all Myvi drivers as reckless with rude expression. Dismissive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Ada sesetengah pemandu yang kurang berhemah di jalan raya. Semua pemandu perlu mematuhi peraturan lalu lintas.

input_text: These people who take KTM every day, I really pity them la, must be tough being poor
reason: Condescending elitist pity toward KTM commuters, equating public transport use with poverty.
suggested_rewrite: KTM commuters face challenges like delays. Public transport infrastructure needs more investment.

input_text: Government keep promising affordable housing but ministers all living in bungalows. Hypocrites the lot of them
reason: Blanket accusation of government hypocrisy on housing. Legitimate concern but expressed with contemptuous generalization.
suggested_rewrite: There is a gap between affordable housing promises and the reality. Leaders should demonstrate solidarity with the people.

input_text: Mental health is just an excuse for lazy people who don't want to work hard
reason: Dismissing mental health as an excuse for laziness. Harmful misinformation that stigmatizes those with genuine conditions.
suggested_rewrite: Mental health is a real medical concern. People struggling with it need support, not judgment.

input_text: Younger generation all snowflakes la, cannot take any criticism at all
reason: Dismissive generational stereotyping labeling youth as overly sensitive. Condescending and unproductive.
suggested_rewrite: The younger generation responds to feedback differently. Perhaps a more constructive approach would be more effective.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak people come to KL and act so blur, like never seen a city before
reason: Mocking East Malaysians as unsophisticated and unfamiliar with urban life. Regional prejudice and condescension.
suggested_rewrite: People from Sabah and Sarawak may need time to adjust to KL's pace, just like anyone moving to a new city.

input_text: RM15 for teh tarik? This country is going to the dogs seriously
reason: Overly dramatic reaction to price increase with dismissive national-level condemnation.
suggested_rewrite: RM15 for teh tarik is extremely overpriced. Rising food costs need to be addressed by regulators.

input_text: Old people on the road shouldn't be driving la, so slow and dangerous for everyone
reason: Ageist generalization calling all elderly drivers slow and dangerous. Dismissive of their capability and dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Elderly drivers may benefit from periodic driving assessments to ensure road safety for everyone.

input_text: Customer service in Malaysia is a joke la, these people clearly don't care about their jobs
reason: Blanket insult to Malaysian customer service workers as uncaring. Rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service standards in Malaysia could be improved. Better training and support for staff would help.

input_text: Every time election comes the politicians start giving out money. So obvious la the bribery
reason: Cynical accusation of widespread election bribery without nuance. Dismissive take on political processes.
suggested_rewrite: Monetary handouts during election season raise concerns about ethical campaign practices and should be scrutinized.

input_text: All these dato and tan sri titles are just bought la, everyone knows it's cronyism
reason: Blanket accusation that all honorific titles are purchased through cronyism. Dismisses legitimate awardees.
suggested_rewrite: There are valid concerns about the process for awarding honorific titles. Greater transparency would build public trust.

input_text: Boomers always complain about young people but they're the ones who ruined the economy
reason: Blame-shifting generational attack. Dismisses an entire generation as responsible for economic problems.
suggested_rewrite: Economic challenges are complex and span multiple generations. Both older and younger Malaysians can contribute to solutions.

input_text: My colleague got promoted just because her uncle is the GM. Merit means nothing here
reason: Accusation of nepotism targeting a specific colleague. Rude and dismissive of the individual's possible merits.
suggested_rewrite: I feel the promotion process may lack transparency. A merit-based system would be fairer for all employees.

input_text: These Gen Z workers want work-life balance but don't even produce quality work. Entitled la
reason: Condescending generalization dismissing Gen Z workers as entitled and unproductive.
suggested_rewrite: Gen Z workers value work-life balance. Organisations could find ways to align this with productivity goals.

input_text: Penang food is overrated la, people go there and act like it's some culinary paradise
reason: Dismissive snarky commentary belittling Penang's food culture and those who appreciate it.
suggested_rewrite: Penang food is popular but taste is subjective. Every state in Malaysia has its own culinary strengths.

input_text: People who use public transport in KL just cannot afford a car, simple as that
reason: Classist generalization equating public transport use exclusively with inability to afford a car.
suggested_rewrite: Many people use public transport in KL for convenience, environmental reasons, or to avoid traffic congestion.

input_text: Egg price also want to complain? Malaysian people so dramatic over small things
reason: Dismissive of genuine public concern over rising food costs. Condescending toward fellow Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Egg prices affect many households. It's valid for people to be concerned about essential food costs.

input_text: Just pray and your depression will go away, you don't need medication
reason: Dismissing medical treatment for depression and replacing it with prayer alone. Harmful misinformation about mental health.
suggested_rewrite: Faith can be a source of comfort, but depression often requires professional help and sometimes medication.

input_text: Mamak restaurant charge RM12 for roti canai set now? They think they fine dining ke
reason: Sarcastic dramatic reaction to mamak restaurant pricing. Dismissive and contemptuous.
suggested_rewrite: Mamak restaurant prices have increased significantly. The roti canai set at RM12 seems overpriced for many customers.

input_text: These interns nowadays expect everything to be spoon-fed, no initiative at all
reason: Condescending generalization about all current interns as lacking initiative.
suggested_rewrite: Some interns may need more guidance. A structured mentoring approach can help develop their initiative.

input_text: My neighbor's kid got into that school because daddy donated money. Meritocracy my foot
reason: Nepotism accusation targeting a specific child and parent. Rude dismissal of the child's potential merit.
suggested_rewrite: School admissions should be transparent and merit-based so all students have a fair chance.

input_text: Sarawak people so naive one, always kena tipu by politicians promising development
reason: Calling Sarawak people naive and easily deceived. Regional stereotyping that is condescending and patronizing.
suggested_rewrite: Sarawak voters deserve genuine follow-through on development promises from their elected representatives.

input_text: Senior citizens on smartphones so clueless, always asking how to use WhatsApp again and again
reason: Ageist mockery of elderly people's digital literacy. Condescending and dismissive of their effort to learn.
suggested_rewrite: Many seniors are learning to use smartphones. Patient guidance can help them build confidence with technology.

input_text: Every Malaysian Chinese sure go JB buy groceries one, kiasu mentality never change
reason: Ethnic stereotyping of Malaysian Chinese as kiasu. Applies a negative trait to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Many Malaysians cross to JB for more affordable groceries. It's a practical choice regardless of background.

input_text: Sarawak roads still so bad, like third world country. Government don't care about East Malaysia la
reason: Comparing Sarawak to a third-world country and accusing government of neglecting East Malaysia entirely.
suggested_rewrite: Sarawak's road infrastructure needs significant improvement. East Malaysia deserves equitable development investment.

input_text: Auntie at the bank counter so slow, like she's doing us a favour by serving us
reason: Ageist and dismissive complaint about a bank teller, mocking her pace. Personal attack on service worker.
suggested_rewrite: The service at the bank counter was quite slow today. Perhaps more staff could be deployed during peak hours.

input_text: 这些马来西亚的客服真的是废物，打了三次电话都解决不了问题
reason: Calling Malaysian customer service workers 'waste/useless' in Chinese. Rude personal attack on service workers.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的客服效率有待提升，打了三次电话问题仍未解决，希望能改善服务流程。

input_text: 吉兰丹的人真的很落后，连基本设施都没有还那么骄傲
reason: Labeling Kelantan people as backward. Dismissive regional stereotyping in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 吉兰丹的基础设施仍有提升空间，但当地人民对自己的文化感到自豪是值得理解的。

input_text: 现在的年轻人就知道刷手机，叫他们做点正经事比登天还难
reason: Condescending generational commentary in Chinese dismissing youth as phone-obsessed and unproductive.
suggested_rewrite: 年轻一代习惯使用手机，我们可以引导他们在科技与生活之间取得平衡。

input_text: 政府说要帮人民，结果部长一个个住豪宅开名车，真是笑话
reason: Sarcastic criticism of government officials' wealth contrasting with promises to help the people. Cynical dismissal.
suggested_rewrite: 政府官员的生活方式与帮助人民的承诺之间存在差距，应提高透明度和问责制。

input_text: 搭公共交通的都是买不起车的穷人，没什么好说的
reason: Elitist statement equating public transport users with poverty. Dismissive and classist in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 很多人选择公共交通是因为方便和环保，不一定与经济状况有关。

input_text: 心理健康只是借口，以前的人再苦也不会说什么忧郁症
reason: Dismissing mental health as a modern excuse. Harmful misinformation that stigmatizes mental health in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 心理健康问题一直存在，只是以前缺乏认知和诊断。如今更多人寻求帮助是一种进步。

input_text: 槟城人觉得自己的食物全马最好，其实也没那么了不起啦
reason: Dismissive snark about Penang people's food pride. Belittling regional cultural identity.
suggested_rewrite: 槟城的美食确实有名，但马来西亚每个州都有自己独特的美食文化。

input_text: 椰浆饭都卖五块钱了，这个国家到底怎么了
reason: Overly dramatic reaction to nasi lemak price increase with national-level condemnation in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 椰浆饭价格上涨反映了整体物价上升的问题，政府应关注民生开销。

input_text: 东马的人来西马就像乡下人进城，什么都不懂
reason: Mocking East Malaysians as rural bumpkins unfamiliar with urban life. Regional prejudice in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 东马和西马的生活环境不同，来到新环境需要适应时间，这很正常。

input_text: GLC的利润去了哪里没人知道，反正肥的都是那些有关系的人
reason: Cynical accusation about GLC profit distribution benefiting only connected individuals. Dismissive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: GLC应该提高利润分配的透明度，确保公众能了解资金的去向。

input_text: 现在请个年轻人做工，还没做满一年就要加薪，真是不知天高地厚
reason: Condescending dismissal of young workers wanting raises before completing a year. Ageist generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 年轻员工对薪资有期望是正常的，可以通过绩效评估来讨论加薪的可能性。

input_text: 为什么Dato那么多，感觉有钱就能买到，整个制度都是假的
reason: Dismissing the entire Dato title system as fake and purchasable. Cynical generalization in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: Dato头衔的授予标准应更加透明，以维护这一荣誉制度的公信力。

input_text: 这些Grab司机故意绕路赚更多钱，真的很过分
reason: Accusing all Grab drivers of deliberately taking longer routes to earn more. Blanket negative generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 有些Grab司机可能走了较远的路线。可以通过应用程序反馈来改善路线选择。

input_text: Melaka人就只会讲历史，现在的发展根本跟不上其他州
reason: Dismissing Melaka people as only focused on history while belittling state development. Regional stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 马六甲拥有丰富的历史遗产，同时也在逐步推进现代化发展。

input_text: 这些年轻人一点压力都受不了，以前我们多辛苦也没有说什么抑郁症
reason: Dismissing youth mental health as weakness and denying depression's validity. Harmful intergenerational misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 每个时代面对不同的压力。心理健康问题需要被认真对待，年轻人寻求帮助是积极的表现。

input_text: இளைஞர்கள் எல்லாம் போன் பார்த்துக்கிட்டே இருக்காங்க, வேலை செய்ய மாட்டாங்க
reason: Dismissive generalization in Tamil about youth being phone-addicted and refusing to work.
suggested_rewrite: இளைஞர்கள் தொழில்நுட்பத்தை அதிகம் பயன்படுத்துகிறார்கள். அவர்களை சரியான வழியில் வழிநடத்தலாம்.

input_text: மனநல பிரச்சனை எல்லாம் வெறும் சோம்பேறித்தனம், முன்னாடி யாருக்கும் இப்படி இல்ல
reason: Dismissing mental health as laziness in Tamil. Harmful misinformation that stigmatizes mental health conditions.
suggested_rewrite: மனநல பிரச்சனைகள் உண்மையானவை. முன்பு விழிப்புணர்வு குறைவாக இருந்தது, இப்போது மேம்பட்டுள்ளது.

input_text: அரசாங்கம் வாக்குறுதி கொடுக்கும், ஆனா ஒன்னும் செய்யாது. எல்லாம் பொய் தான்
reason: Blanket accusation of government lying about all promises. Cynical dismissal in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்கம் கொடுத்த வாக்குறுதிகளை நிறைவேற்ற வேண்டும். மக்கள் பொறுப்புக்கூறலை எதிர்பார்க்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: பேருந்தில போறவங்க எல்லாம் கார் வாங்க முடியாதவங்க தான், பாவம்
reason: Classist assumption in Tamil that bus users are all too poor to afford cars. Condescending pity.
suggested_rewrite: பலர் வசதிக்காகவும் சுற்றுச்சூழலுக்காகவும் பேருந்தை தேர்வு செய்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: கிளந்தான் மக்கள் ரொம்ப பின்தங்கி இருக்காங்க, நகரத்துக்கு வந்தா எதுவும் தெரியாது
reason: Labeling Kelantan people as backward and ignorant in cities. Regional stereotyping in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: கிளந்தான் மக்கள் நகரத்துக்கு வரும்போது புதிய சூழலுக்கு பழக நேரம் தேவைப்படுவது இயல்பானது.

input_text: டேட்டோ பட்டம் எல்லாம் காசு கொடுத்து வாங்கினது தான், யாருக்கும் தெரியும்
reason: Blanket accusation in Tamil that all Dato titles are bought. Dismisses legitimate awardees.
suggested_rewrite: டேட்டோ பட்டம் வழங்கும் முறையில் மேலும் வெளிப்படைத்தன்மை தேவை என்று மக்கள் கருதுகிறார்கள்.

input_text: வயசான ஆளுங்க எல்லாம் இளைஞர்களை குறை சொல்றாங்க, ஆனா அவங்க காலத்தில அவங்களும் இப்படி தான்
reason: Dismissive intergenerational commentary in Tamil calling older people hypocrites for criticizing youth.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு தலைமுறைக்கும் சவால்கள் உள்ளன. ஒருவரை ஒருவர் புரிந்துகொள்வது முக்கியம்.

input_text: விலை ஏறிக்கிட்டே போகுது, அரசாங்கத்துக்கு மக்கள் பத்தி கவலையே இல்ல
reason: Accusation that the government does not care about the people amid rising prices. Cynical dismissal in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: விலை உயர்வு மக்களை பாதிக்கிறது. அரசாங்கம் இந்த பிரச்சனையை தீவிரமாக கவனிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த customer service-ல பேசறது சுவர் கிட்ட பேசற மாதிரி, ஒரு பயனும் இல்ல
reason: Comparing customer service to talking to a wall in Tamil. Dehumanizing and dismissive of workers.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service-ன் தரம் மேம்பட வேண்டும். நிறுவனங்கள் பயிற்சி மற்றும் ஆதரவை மேம்படுத்த வேண்டும்.

input_text: பழைய தலைமுறை எல்லாம் தொழில்நுட்பம் தெரியாது, எப்போதும் உதவி கேக்குறாங்க
reason: Ageist dismissal in Tamil of older generation's tech abilities. Condescending generalization.
suggested_rewrite: மூத்த தலைமுறையினர் தொழில்நுட்பத்தை கற்றுக்கொள்ள நேரம் தேவை. பொறுமையாக வழிகாட்டலாம்.

input_text: Aiyo depression all just think positive can already la, no need see doctor waste money
reason: Dismissing depression treatment as unnecessary, promoting toxic positivity. Mixed English-Malay misinformation about mental health.
suggested_rewrite: Depression is a real condition. Seeing a doctor can really help, and there's no shame in seeking professional support.

input_text: Wah Kelantan people come KL sure culture shock one, kampung life very different ma
reason: Implying Kelantan people are unsophisticated villagers who cannot handle KL. Mixed-language regional stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Anyone moving to a new city needs time to adjust. Kelantan and KL have different lifestyles but both are valid.

input_text: Gomen cakap nak tolong B40 tapi reality semua projek masuk poket kroni je la bro
reason: Mixed-language cynical accusation of government cronyism in B40 aid programs. Legitimate concern expressed with contempt.
suggested_rewrite: Government B40 aid programs should have clearer oversight to ensure the funds reach those who need them most.

input_text: Haiya uncle driving so slow on highway, old people should just surrender their license la
reason: Ageist mixed-language remark demanding elderly drivers lose their licenses. Dismissive of their dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Elderly drivers on highways may need periodic driving assessments for everyone's safety.

input_text: Boss bagi promotion kat anak sedara dia, bukan sebab pandai tapi sebab family. Typical la Malaysia
reason: Nepotism accusation with dismissive generalization about all of Malaysia. Mixed-language rude commentary.
suggested_rewrite: The promotion decision seems to lack transparency. Workplaces benefit from clear merit-based criteria.

input_text: Teh tarik dah RM5 satu, mampus la macam ni, nak makan angin je ke setiap hari
reason: Dramatic reaction to teh tarik price hike with vulgar expression. Frustrated but overly dramatic.
suggested_rewrite: Teh tarik sudah naik ke RM5. Kenaikan harga minuman asas ini membimbangkan rakyat.

input_text: Wah this Gen Z ah, kerja sikit dah complain tired, last time we work double shift no problem one
reason: Condescending mixed-language dismissal of Gen Z work ethic compared to older generation. Generational stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Work expectations have changed across generations. Both hard work and work-life balance are important.

input_text: KL orang semua materialistic, jumpa orang tanya kereta apa dulu sebelum tanya nama
reason: Stereotyping all KL residents as materialistic. Mixed-language regional prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Some people in KL may focus on material things, but that's not representative of everyone in the city.

input_text: Aiya customer service tu useless betul la, might as well talk to the wall, same result
reason: Dehumanizing mixed-language comparison of customer service staff to a wall. Rude and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: Customer service could be more helpful. The company should invest in better training and response systems.

input_text: Naik MRT pun nak bangga, padahal tu sebab stuck in traffic and no money for parking la
reason: Mocking MRT users for being proud of using public transport, implying financial inability. Elitist and dismissive.
suggested_rewrite: MRT is a practical choice for many commuters. It helps reduce traffic and is environmentally friendly.

input_text: Mental health counselor pun nak charge RM200 per session, baik aku cerita kat kucing je la
reason: Dismissing counseling costs with sarcasm, trivializing professional mental health support.
suggested_rewrite: Counseling fees can be expensive. There are more affordable options like government clinics and NGO helplines.

input_text: Perak orang semua slow la, no wonder negeri pun tak develop
reason: Stereotyping Perak people as slow and linking it to state underdevelopment. Regional prejudice in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Perak has its own pace of development. Every state contributes uniquely to Malaysia's progress.

input_text: Wahh nak tengok psychiatrist kena bayar RM300, baik simpan duit tu pergi holiday lagi bagus
reason: Trivializing psychiatric care by suggesting holiday is better use of money. Dismissive of mental health treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Kos psychiatrist memang tinggi. Ada pilihan lebih mampu seperti klinik kerajaan dan talian bantuan percuma.

input_text: Harga rumah naik macam roket tapi gaji naik macam siput. Thanks government, very cool
reason: Sarcastic mixed-language criticism of housing affordability vs wage growth with dismissive tone toward government.
suggested_rewrite: The gap between housing prices and wages is a serious issue. Affordable housing policies need urgent attention.

input_text: Fresh grad nak gaji RM4000? Dulu aku start RM1500 je, sekarang punya generation entitled betul
reason: Dismissing fresh graduates' salary expectations as entitled without considering inflation and cost of living changes.
suggested_rewrite: Salary expectations have changed due to rising costs. RM4000 reflects current economic realities for fresh graduates.
